allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/taxi-rates.json''\); console.log\(''Total entries:'', d.length\); console.log\(''Sample:'', JSON.stringify\(d.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/taxi-rates.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\(''Structure type:'', typeof d\); console.log\(''Top-level keys:'', keys.length\); console.log\(''Keys:'', keys.slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/taxi-rates.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\(''Total cities:'', keys.length\); console.log\(''All keys:'', JSON.stringify\(keys.sort\(\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/taxi-rates.json''\); console.log\(''Sample Bangkok:'', JSON.stringify\(d[''bangkok''], null, 2\)\); console.log\(''Sample Tokyo:'', JSON.stringify\(d[''tokyo''], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/tipping-seo.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\(''Total countries:'', keys.length\); console.log\(''All keys:'', JSON.stringify\(keys.sort\(\)\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/tipping-seo.json''\); console.log\(''Sample Thailand:'', JSON.stringify\(d[''thailand''], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/taxi-rates.json''\); const sample = Object.entries\(d\).slice\(0,3\).map\(\([k,v]\) => \({key:k, fields: Object.keys\(v\)}\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(sample, null, 2\)\);")
